title: Design an Interactive Heatmap of a Stock Market Trend
scenario: Create a high-resolution interactive heatmap that displays the daily fluctuations of the stock market trend over a period of 2 years. The heatmap should be able to highlight the top 3 performing stocks and allow users to hover over individual stocks to view their historical data. Include a color legend to explain the color coding.
constraints: Must have a maximum file size of 500KB

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the heatmap adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the heatmap easy to understand and navigate?
Does the heatmap allow users to interact with it and view individual stock data?
Does the heatmap meet the specified file size constraint?
